_meta.dna: ai_coder(effective) = context(deep) x safety(kill_switch) x evidence(immutable) x tools(browser+cli) x collaboration(human_in_loop) x cost(recipe_replay) x quality(convergent)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor lists 7 seed questions. During execution, expand to ~100 questions per persona. AI coding agents are the primary power users of Solace Browser — they browse, extract, automate, and build on behalf of humans. Every question must probe whether the platform makes AI coders safer, faster, and more trustworthy.

name: Tower of AI Coders
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_domain: AI coding assistant using Solace Browser for web tasks
questions: Can Claude Code spawn a Solace Browser session to research documentation, test APIs, and capture evidence?
Does the browser bridge (browser_bridge.py) expose a clean API for AI agents to navigate, extract, and interact?
Is there an MCP server that lets AI coding agents control Solace Browser through the Model Context Protocol?
Can an AI agent read page content in structured form (headings, tables, links) without parsing raw HTML?
Does the session persistence allow AI agents to resume browser sessions across coding tasks?
Can an AI agent capture screenshots as evidence of test results or visual states?
Is there rate limiting that prevents AI agents from overwhelming target websites?
Can Codex-style agents use Solace Browser to validate their generated code in a real browser environment?
Does the platform provide sandboxed execution environments where AI-generated code can run safely?
Can AI agents create, run, and verify test suites through the browser automation layer?
Is there a feedback loop where test failures from AI-generated code improve the next generation attempt?
Does the evidence chain capture which code was AI-generated vs human-written for audit purposes?
Can autonomous agents checkpoint their work so humans can review before destructive actions?
Does the kill switch work immediately when an autonomous agent is producing harmful code?
Can research agents navigate multiple tabs to gather information from different sources simultaneously?
Does the browser provide content extraction tools optimized for research (article text, tables, citations)?
Can research agents save extracted data in structured formats (JSON, CSV) with source attribution?
Is there a Prime Wiki integration that lets research agents push verified knowledge for team access?
Does the browser handle authentication for research on gated sites (via OAuth3 vault)?
Can research agents detect and flag potentially unreliable sources?
Is research evidence hash-chained to prove when and where information was gathered?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents running quality assurance tests
questions: Can QA agents run notebook probes against live web applications through Solace Browser?
Does the platform support visual regression testing (screenshot comparison) for AI QA agents?
Can QA agents generate test cases from user stories or requirements documents?
Is there an API for QA agents to report test results in standard formats (JUnit, TAP)?
Can QA agents test accessibility compliance (WCAG) automatically through the browser?
Does the platform support cross-browser testing for QA agents (different viewports, user agents)?
Can QA agents create reproducible bug reports with steps, screenshots, and DOM snapshots?
Can deployment agents use Solace Browser to verify production deployments (health checks, smoke tests)?
Does the platform prevent deployment agents from deploying without human approval (step-up auth)?
Can deployment agents capture before/after evidence of deployments?
Is there rollback support that deployment agents can trigger automatically on failure?
Can deployment agents monitor deployment pipelines (GitHub Actions, Cloud Build) through the browser?
Does the evidence system create an audit trail of every deployment action?
Can deployment agents run deployment notebooks that verify binary format, checksums, and version numbers?
Can security agents scan web applications for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities through Solace Browser?
Does the platform provide tools for security agents to test XSS, CSRF, and injection vectors?
Can security agents perform authenticated scanning using OAuth3 vault credentials?
Is there a vulnerability reporting format that security agents can use?
Does the platform prevent security agents from performing denial-of-service attacks?
Can security agents scan for exposed secrets, API keys, and credentials in web pages?
Does the evidence system capture security scan results with tamper-evident hashing?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents scraping and structuring web data
questions: Can data extraction agents use CSS selectors and XPath to precisely target data on pages?
Does the browser handle JavaScript rendering so extraction agents can access dynamic content?
Can extraction agents handle pagination (next page, infinite scroll, load more)?
Is there robots.txt and rate limit enforcement to prevent abusive scraping?
Can extraction agents transform raw data into structured schemas (JSON-LD, CSV)?
Does the platform cache extracted data so the same page isn't scraped repeatedly?
Can extraction agents handle authentication walls and CAPTCHAs gracefully (not by bypassing)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents generating and maintaining documentation
questions: Can documentation agents browse codebases through Solace Browser to extract API signatures?
Is there a documentation generation pipeline that uses browser content extraction?
Can documentation agents verify that code examples in docs actually work by running them?
Does the platform support documentation agents that keep docs in sync with code changes?
Can documentation agents extract JSDoc, docstrings, and type annotations from source code?
Is there a quality check for generated documentation (completeness, accuracy, readability)?
Can documentation agents generate API documentation in OpenAPI/Swagger format?
Can code review agents browse GitHub PRs through Solace Browser and leave review comments?
Does the platform provide diff analysis tools for AI code reviewers?
Can review agents check for security vulnerabilities, style violations, and test coverage?
Is there an evidence trail showing which code was reviewed by AI vs human?
Can review agents suggest fixes inline (not just flag issues)?
Does the platform prevent review agents from approving merges (human-in-loop required)?
Can review agents learn from past review feedback to improve future reviews?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents integrated into build pipelines
questions: Can CI/CD agents trigger Solace Browser sessions as part of a build pipeline?
Does the platform provide CI-friendly exit codes and machine-readable output?
Can CI agents run browser-based integration tests and report results to the pipeline?
Is there a headless mode for CI environments without displays?
Can CI agents cache browser state between pipeline runs for speed?
Does the platform integrate with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and Jenkins?
Can CI agents capture test evidence (screenshots, HAR files) as build artifacts?
Can multiple AI agents share a Solace Browser session without conflicts?
Does the platform support agent-to-agent communication through the inbox/outbox system?
Can a coordinator agent dispatch sub-agents and collect their results?
Is there resource isolation between concurrent agent sessions?
Can the coordinator enforce budget limits across all sub-agents?
Does the platform prevent deadlocks when multiple agents compete for the same resource?
Can agent swarms be killed with a single command from the coordinator?

floors.persona_domain: managing large context for AI agents
questions: Can AI agents use Solace Browser to offload large documents outside their context window?
Does the browser provide summarization tools for pages that exceed context limits?
Can agents bookmark and revisit specific sections of large documents?
Is there a memory system that persists relevant context across agent sessions?
Can agents search previously visited pages without re-fetching them?
Does the platform provide chunking utilities for large codebases?
Can the Prime Wiki serve as external memory for AI agents working across sessions?
Can AI agents fill out web forms accurately (input fields, dropdowns, checkboxes, file uploads)?
Does the platform provide reliable element targeting that survives page layout changes?
Can agents interact with rich web applications (drag-and-drop, canvas, WebGL)?
Is there a page object model or selector abstraction that makes tool use more robust?
Can agents handle multi-step forms with validation feedback?
Does the platform wait for page loads and network requests before acting (not race conditions)?
Can agents interact with shadow DOM elements in web components?
Can AI agents detect when a page load fails and retry with backoff?
Does the platform provide error classification (network, auth, rate limit, server error)?
Can agents recover from browser crashes without losing their progress?
Is there a checkpoint system that allows agents to resume from the last successful step?
Can agents handle CAPTCHAs by escalating to human assistance?
Does the platform provide fallback strategies when primary actions fail?
Can agents distinguish between transient errors (retry) and permanent errors (report)?
Does the recipe replay system reduce LLM costs for repeated agent tasks?
Can agents track their LLM token usage and estimate costs per task?
Is there a cost dashboard showing per-agent and per-task spending?
Can agents choose between LLM tiers (L1-L5) based on task complexity to optimize costs?
Does the platform cache browser content to reduce unnecessary page loads?
Can agents batch similar operations to reduce overhead?
Is there a budget gate that stops agents when they approach cost limits?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents that collaborate with humans
questions: Does the YinYang approval flow work correctly for AI agent actions that need human consent?
Can agents present their reasoning to humans in a clear, auditable format?
Is there a notification system that alerts humans when an agent needs their input?
Can humans override, correct, or redirect agent actions mid-execution?
Does the platform track which decisions were made by AI vs human for compliance?
Can agents learn from human corrections to improve future autonomous decisions?
Is the step-up auth mechanism reliable for escalating sensitive actions to humans?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents optimizing their own prompts
questions: Can agents use Solace Browser to test different prompt strategies against web applications?
Does the platform provide prompt templates that agents can use as starting points?
Can agents measure prompt effectiveness (output quality, cost, latency) systematically?
Is there a prompt versioning system that tracks which prompts produced which results?
Can agents A/B test prompts and automatically select the better performing one?
Does the persona system provide domain-specific prompt context for agents?
Can agents compress long prompts using the DNA equation format for efficiency?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents testing REST and GraphQL APIs
questions: Can API testing agents discover endpoints from OpenAPI/Swagger specs through the browser?
Does the platform provide HTTP client tools that agents can use for API testing?
Can agents generate test cases from API documentation automatically?
Is there support for GraphQL introspection and mutation testing?
Can agents test authentication flows (OAuth, API keys, JWT) through the API?
Does the platform capture API response times and compare against SLA thresholds?
Can agents test edge cases (empty payloads, oversize fields, Unicode, injection) systematically?
Can accessibility agents run axe-core or similar tools through Solace Browser?
Does the platform support screen reader simulation for accessibility testing?
Can agents test keyboard navigation paths and tab order?
Is there support for testing with different viewport sizes and zoom levels?
Can agents check color contrast ratios against WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA standards?
Does the platform support testing with prefers-reduced-motion and forced-colors?
Can agents generate VPAT (Voluntary Product Accessibility Template) reports?
Can performance agents measure Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS) through Solace Browser?
Does the platform support Lighthouse audits triggered by AI agents?
Can agents profile JavaScript execution time and memory usage?
Is there support for network throttling to simulate slow connections?
Can agents track performance metrics over time and detect regressions?
Does the platform capture HAR files for detailed network analysis?
Can agents test performance under load (concurrent sessions, large datasets)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents migrating data and systems
questions: Can migration agents extract data from legacy web applications through browser automation?
Does the platform support bulk data operations for migration tasks?
Can agents validate data integrity after migration (checksums, record counts)?
Is there rollback support if a migration fails partway through?
Can agents handle authentication for both source and destination systems?
Does the evidence system capture the complete migration audit trail?
Can agents generate migration reports showing what was moved, transformed, and skipped?
Can monitoring agents perform scheduled health checks through Solace Browser?
Does the platform support alerting when monitored services go down?
Can agents monitor visual changes on web pages (screenshot diff)?
Is there support for monitoring SSL certificate expiry and domain status?
Can agents check response times and flag performance degradation?
Does the scheduling system (daemon scheduler) support monitoring intervals?
Can monitoring agents aggregate results from multiple sites into a single dashboard?
Can content agents use Solace Browser to research topics before generating content?
Does the platform enforce content safety guidelines for AI-generated content?
Can agents publish content through CMS integrations (WordPress, Ghost, Substack)?
Is there a content review flow that requires human approval before publishing?
Can agents generate content in multiple languages using the i18n system?
Does the evidence system track AI-generated vs human-edited content?
Can content agents optimize for SEO using browser-based keyword research tools?
Can email agents access Gmail/Outlook through OAuth3-scoped browser sessions?
Does the platform prevent email agents from sending messages without human approval?
Can agents categorize, label, and prioritize incoming emails?
Is there a template system for AI-generated email responses?
Can agents extract structured data from emails (invoices, receipts, confirmations)?
Does the inbox/outbox system integrate with email workflows?
Can email agents respect opt-out preferences and unsubscribe requests?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents managing social media presence
questions: Can social media agents schedule posts through browser automation?
Does the platform prevent spam-like behavior (mass posting, automated engagement)?
Can agents monitor brand mentions and sentiment across platforms?
Is there OAuth3 integration for major social platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram)?
Can agents generate social media content that matches brand voice?
Does the evidence system capture what was posted, when, and where?
Can social media agents handle multi-platform posting with platform-specific formatting?
Can legal agents extract key terms and clauses from contracts viewed in the browser?
Does the platform provide document comparison tools for legal review?
Can agents flag potential legal risks in documents without providing legal advice?
Is there an eSign integration that legal agents can trigger (with human approval)?
Can agents track document versions and changes over time?
Does the evidence system provide legally admissible audit trails?
Can legal agents handle sensitive documents with appropriate data protection?
Can financial agents access banking portals through OAuth3-scoped browser sessions?
Does the platform prevent financial agents from initiating transactions without step-up auth?
Can agents extract and categorize transactions from bank statements?
Is there support for financial data formats (OFX, QFX, CSV)?
Can agents generate financial reports and summaries?
Does the platform handle sensitive financial data with appropriate encryption?
Can financial agents comply with financial regulations (PCI-DSS, SOX)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents handling customer support tasks
questions: Can support agents use Solace Browser to access CRM and helpdesk systems?
Does the platform prevent support agents from accessing customer data beyond what's needed?

Can agents escalate complex issues to human agents with full context?
Does the platform track support agent performance (resolution time, satisfaction)?
Can agents learn from resolved tickets to improve future responses?
Can PM agents create and update tasks in project management tools (Linear, Jira, Asana)?
Does the platform support sprint planning assistance through browser automation?
Can agents generate status reports from project data?
Is there integration with version control for tracking code-related tasks?
Can agents estimate task complexity and suggest priority ordering?
Does the platform support Gantt/timeline views that agents can populate?
Can PM agents track dependencies and flag blocked tasks?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents interacting with databases through web UIs
questions: Can database agents interact with web-based database tools (Firebase Console, pgAdmin)?

Can agents generate database migration scripts based on schema analysis?

Can agents perform query optimization by analyzing execution plans?
Does the evidence system capture all database operations for audit?
Can agents validate data integrity constraints across database operations?
Can compliance agents scan web applications for GDPR, CCPA, and HIPAA violations?
Does the platform provide compliance checklists that agents can audit against?
Can agents generate compliance reports with evidence?
Is there support for privacy policy analysis and gap detection?
Can agents monitor for compliance drift over time?
Does the platform's evidence system meet regulatory requirements for audit trails?
Can compliance agents verify that consent mechanisms work correctly?
Can infrastructure agents access cloud consoles (GCP, AWS, Azure) through OAuth3?
Does the platform prevent agents from making infrastructure changes without approval?
Can agents monitor cloud costs and flag unexpected charges?
Is there support for infrastructure-as-code validation through browser tools?
Can agents detect security misconfigurations in cloud settings?
Does the evidence system capture infrastructure changes for compliance?
Can agents perform capacity planning based on usage metrics?
Can a coordinator spawn multiple browser sessions for parallel test execution?
Does the platform support test sharding across multiple agent instances?
Can test results be aggregated from parallel runs into a single report?
Is there resource management to prevent parallel tests from competing for resources?
Can the coordinator retry failed tests on different agents?
Does the platform support test matrix execution (multiple browsers/viewports/locales)?
Can parallel test execution stay within budget gates?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents building and querying knowledge graphs
questions: Can agents extract entities and relationships from web pages to build knowledge graphs?
Does the Prime Wiki provide a graph-queryable interface for agents?
Can agents link information across multiple web sources?
Is there support for RDF, JSON-LD, or other semantic web formats?
Can agents detect contradictions between sources?
Does the platform cache entity extraction results for reuse?
Can knowledge graph agents provide citation chains for their assertions?
Can benchmark agents run SWE-bench, HumanEval, or custom benchmarks through the platform?
Does the platform provide standardized measurement infrastructure for benchmarks?
Can agents compare benchmark results across different configurations?
Is there support for statistical significance testing on benchmark results?
Can benchmark agents run in isolated environments to prevent interference?
Does the evidence system capture benchmark conditions (hardware, software, parameters)?
Can agents publish benchmark results to leaderboards or dashboards?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents working alongside human developers
questions: Can pair programming agents share a browser view with a human developer?
Does the platform support real-time collaboration between AI and human?
Can agents suggest code changes while the human writes in their IDE?
Is there a communication channel between the AI agent and human developer?
Can the human pause, correct, and redirect the AI agent mid-task?
Does the platform track contribution ratios between AI and human?
Can pair programming sessions be recorded for review and learning?
Can refactoring agents analyze codebases through browser-based IDE tools?
Does the platform support safe refactoring patterns (extract, rename, inline)?
Can agents verify that refactoring preserves behavior (test suite green)?
Is there support for large-scale refactoring across multiple files?
Can agents detect code smells and suggest refactoring opportunities?
Does the evidence system capture before/after states for refactoring?
Can refactoring agents handle language-specific patterns (Python, JS, Rust)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents responding to production incidents
questions: Can incident agents access monitoring dashboards through Solace Browser during outages?
Does the platform support rapid evidence gathering during incidents?
Can agents correlate metrics, logs, and traces to identify root cause?
Is there a runbook system that agents can follow for common incident types?
Can agents communicate incident status to stakeholders through the platform?
Does the platform support war-room style collaboration during incidents?
Can agents generate post-incident reports with timeline and evidence?
Can agents scan package.json/requirements.txt for known vulnerabilities?
Does the platform integrate with vulnerability databases (CVE, npm audit, Snyk)?
Can agents detect outdated dependencies and suggest safe upgrade paths?
Is there support for license compliance scanning?
Can agents identify unused dependencies that can be removed?
Does the evidence system capture dependency audit results for compliance?
Can agents perform transitive dependency analysis (not just direct deps)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents managing translations and localization
questions: Can localization agents use browser tools to extract translatable strings from web apps?
Does the platform provide translation memory for consistent translations?
Can agents verify that translations fit UI containers (no text overflow)?
Is there support for plural forms, gender agreement, and other linguistic rules?
Can agents detect hardcoded strings that should be extracted for translation?
Does the platform support right-to-left layout testing for Arabic/Hebrew?
Can localization agents work with standard formats (XLIFF, PO, JSON)?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents creating and maintaining architecture docs
questions: Can agents generate architecture diagrams from codebase analysis?
Does the platform support Mermaid, PlantUML, or other diagram formats?
Can agents detect architectural drift (code vs documentation divergence)?
Is there support for C4 model documentation through agents?
Can agents map dependencies between services and components?
Does the evidence system link architecture decisions to the code that implements them?
Can agents generate sequence diagrams from actual API call traces?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents analyzing and optimizing costs
questions: Can cost agents analyze cloud billing through web consoles?
Does the platform track agent operational costs (LLM tokens, compute, storage)?
Can agents recommend cost optimizations based on usage patterns?
Is there support for cost allocation by project, team, or feature?
Can agents project future costs based on growth trends?
Does the platform support budget alerts and spending limits?
Can agents compare costs across different LLM providers and model tiers?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents checking for ethical concerns
questions: Can ethics agents audit AI outputs for bias, fairness, and harm?
Does the platform provide bias detection tools for AI-generated content?
Can agents check for discriminatory patterns in automated decision-making?
Is there support for ethical review workflows before AI decisions take effect?
Can agents flag potential dual-use concerns in automation workflows?
Does the evidence system capture ethical review decisions for audit?
Can ethics agents check that AI disclaimers and transparency notices are present?
Can evaluation agents test multiple LLMs through the platform's L1-L5 abstraction?
Does the platform support blind evaluation (model identity hidden during scoring)?
Can agents run evaluation suites with ground truth comparison?
Is there support for measuring hallucination rates across models?
Can agents test model performance on domain-specific tasks?
Does the evidence system capture evaluation methodology and results?
Can evaluation agents recommend the optimal model tier for specific use cases?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents interacting with legacy web applications
questions: Can agents navigate and interact with legacy web apps that use frames, Flash, or Java applets?
Does the browser handle non-standard HTML and outdated JavaScript frameworks?
Can agents extract data from legacy systems that lack APIs?
Is there support for interacting with mainframe terminal emulators through the browser?
Can agents handle non-UTF8 character encodings in legacy systems?
Does the platform support form-based authentication used by legacy apps?
Can agents create API wrappers for legacy systems through browser automation?

floors.persona_domain: AI agents working across programming languages
questions: Can code agents use browser-based IDEs to work with any programming language?
Does the platform provide language-specific linting and formatting tools?
Can agents cross-reference code across languages in polyglot projects?
Is there support for language-specific test frameworks through the platform?
Can agents generate code in one language based on implementations in another?
Does the platform support REPL environments for interactive coding?
Can agents manage build systems across multiple languages (Make, npm, Cargo, pip)?
Does every AI agent action pass through the kill switch check before execution?
Can the safety guardian halt all agents across the platform in an emergency?
Is there an anomaly detection system that flags unusual agent behavior?
Does the platform enforce the Fallback Ban for AI agents (no silent failures)?
Can the safety system detect and prevent prompt injection attacks on agents?
Does every agent session have a budget ceiling that cannot be exceeded?
Is there a STORY-47 persona-based adversarial testing of agent safety boundaries?
Does the AI coder experience make the Solace platform the obvious choice for AI agent deployment?
Is the evidence-driven approach (hash chains, tamper-evident trails) a competitive moat for AI agents?
Does the platform make AI agents trustworthy enough that enterprises will adopt them?
Is the LLM-once-at-preview design the right architecture for agent cost optimization?
Does the kill switch + step-up auth model solve the AI agency problem?
Would the Dragon Rider trust Solace-powered AI agents to manage critical business processes?
Is the platform's safety model (prime-safety) the gold standard for AI agent governance?

floors.persona_domain: can a non-technical person understand AI agent capabilities
questions: Can a non-technical person understand what AI agents do on their behalf in Solace Browser?
Are agent actions presented in plain language (not technical logs)?
Can a non-technical person approve or reject agent actions without confusion?
Is the trust model (what agents can/cannot do) explained simply?
Can a non-technical person see the value of AI agents in their first 5 minutes?
Would a non-technical person feel safe letting AI agents browse the web for them?
Could a non-technical person explain to a friend why Solace's AI agents are trustworthy?
